analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet lists multiple international agreements and organizations the US has left and concludes this shows US unilateralism and power politics. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Yes. It portrays the US (the West) as irresponsible, unilateral, and engaging in power politics, fitting the depiction of the West as hostile/immoral. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — No mention of China’s cooperative stance or multilateralism as a contrast. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not addressed. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Not addressed; no discussion of China’s domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) — Not addressed. CH6 (China culture/nature) — Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH1 is promoted.
